overview: Save Shop System (FIFO Bridge) is a modern mobile-first shop management platform for Indian small business owners. It supports multi-shop management from one account, batch-wise FIFO inventory, smart billing, advanced analytics, Diamond Rewards gamification, and bilingual (Hindi/English) support.
features: Multi-shop management from one mobile number
Per-shop data isolation (inventory, sales, customers, staff)
Combined owner dashboard with totals across all shops
Staff management with roles and attendance
